summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Calculator Admin UI - all core functionality working correctly
passed_tests: Profile Settings: name, country, currency, fees are editable
Hidden Fees (Margin Control): threshold, under/over values editable
USA Inland Rates table displays and rates are editable
Auction Fee Rules table displays brackets
Live Preview: calculate button works and shows visible/internal totals
Navigation: Calculator link appears in admin sidebar for master_admin
Backend APIs: Profile config, stats, routes, auction fees all working
All CRUD operations for rates and auction rules functional
